content:
💡 pentagi | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: Automated penetration testing and security vulnerability assessment using AI agents.
✨ Key Features: • Fully Autonomous AI-powered penetration testing • Secure & Isolated Docker environment • 20+ professional security tools (nmap, metasploit, sqlmap, etc.) • Smart Memory System for storing research results • Knowledge Graph Integration (Graphiti/Neo4j)
📖 Summary: PentAGI is an open-source, autonomous AI agent system designed for automated penetration testing. It leverages a multi-agent architecture and integrates professional security tools within a sandboxed environment to discover and exploit vulnerabilities.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
